name: Plasma Dagger
description: A fiery little knife that glows with heat! It burns extra bright when you land a perfect hit. Deals 1d4+2 slashing damage, and adds 1d4 bonus fire damage on a critical hit.

name: Neural Pistol
description: A zappy mind-blaster pistol! It stings even harder when your target is already hurting. Deals 1d6+2 psychic damage, and adds 1d6 bonus damage if the target is already injured.

name: Rift Shard
description: A glowing crystal that hums with sparkly magic energy. Use it to blink 30 feet away in a flash, or crush it in your hand to heal 1d6 hit points. One use only!
